app.slogan: AI Agent Demo — RAG, Tool Calling & Multi-Agent Collaboration

hero.title: Production-Grade AI Agent Demo

capabilities.title: RAG Knowledge Base
capabilities.desc: Vector search with MMR reranking over 18+ technical articles. Every answer cites its sources.

capabilities.title: Prompt Experiments
capabilities.desc: Compare Direct, Chain-of-Thought, and Few-shot strategies side by side on the same test set.

capabilities.title: Multi-Agent Pipeline
capabilities.desc: Researcher → Writer → Editor: three AI agents collaborate in real-time with SSE streaming.
